nodes.name: Mayotte sunbird
nodes.summary: Mayotte sunbird（Cinnyris coquerellii）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Mayotte sunbird。

nodes.name: Mayotte sunbird
nodes.summary: The Mayotte sunbird (Cinnyris coquerellii) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is endemic to Mayotte and surrounding islets in the southeastern Comoros. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. References BirdLife International 2004. Nectarinia coquerellii. 2006 IUCN Red List of Threatened Species. Downloaded on 26 July 2007.
